description: You are a Royalty Analyst at a music distribution company processing the Q3 2024 payout run. Using the ROYALTY_ADMIN schema (royalty_admin/Royalty2024, Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1), calculate track revenue based on streaming rates of $0.0075 for 'PREMIUM' and $0.0015 for 'FREE' streams. Create a view named VW_TRACK_REVENUE containing track_id, premium_streams, free_streams, and total_revenue (rounded to 4 decimal places). Identify tracks where the sum of ownership_pct does not equal 100.00 in a view named VW_INVALID_SPLITS, including track_id and total_pct (rounded to 2 decimal places). Isolate the withheld revenue for these invalid tracks into a table named SUSPENSE_BALANCES with columns track_id and withheld_revenue (rounded to 2 decimal places). For all tracks with valid ownership splits, generate a materialized view named MV_ROYALTY_STATEMENTS containing holder_id, holder_name, total_payout (rounded to 2 decimal places), track_count, and the title of the top_earning_track for each rights holder. Export the contents of MV_ROYALTY_STATEMENTS where total_payout is greater than 10.00 to /home/ga/Documents/exports/q3_payouts.csv.
